elements.name: barriers_implementation_ai
elements.title: Do you anticipate any barriers to using what you’ve learned about AI?

choices.text: It is not clear to me how to apply what I’ve learned
AI use has been discouraged in my school/district
I need to learn more about AI before using it in my classroom/role
I need more practice on my own before using it in my classroom/role
My school/district restricts access to AI tools
My school/district doesn't have clear guidance or policies around using and teaching about AI

elements.name: barriers_implementation_teaching_cs
elements.title: Do you anticipate any barriers to using what you’ve learned about teaching {module}?

choices.text: It is not clear to me how to apply what I’ve learned
I need more preparation before teaching this content in my classroom
I have limited time to adopt new curriculum
I don't have enough support from my school's administration
My students don’t seem interested in computer science and/or this content

elements.name: better_understanding_concepts
elements.title: After completing this module, I have a better understanding of the concepts introduced in {module}.

elements.name: comfort_ability_to_teach
elements.title: After completing this module, I feel more comfortable in my ability to teach Code.org’s {module} curriculum than I did before starting this professional learning experience.
elements.natalia_comment: NOTE: set the {module} variable in the simple survey configuration to pass-through the value you want to appear in the survey (eg. computer vision)

elements.name: confidence_use_skills
elements.title: After completing this module, do you feel more or less confident than before about using the skills you learned in this module?

elements.name: current_level_cs_knowledge
elements.title: Which best describes your current level of knowledge about computer science?

choices.text: I have done a few activities/games online (e.g. the Hour of Code)
I have taken a few courses in computer science (e.g. online classes, college courses)
I have attended facilitator-led professional development to teach computer science
I have a degree in computer science (e.g. an undergraduate or graduate degree)

elements.name: familiar_student_programming_environments
elements.title: After completing this module, I am more familiar with the programming environments and learning tools that students will use in the {module} curriculum.

elements.name: familiarity_ai
elements.title: Which best describes your current level of familiarity with Artificial Intelligence (AI)?

choices.text: I have used AI a few times
I have attended professional development around using AI
I regularly use AI in my role

elements.name: first_self_paced_pl
elements.title: Is this your first time taking a Code.org self-paced professional learning experience?

elements.name: participate_focus_group
elements.title: OPTIONAL: Would you be willing to participate in a follow-up focus group to provide direct feedback about this professional learning experience?

elements.name: self_paced_pl_email_focus_group
elements.title: Great! Please share an email address where we may contact you.

elements.name: gender
elements.title: Gender (optional):

elements.name: how_long_to_complete_module
elements.title: How long did you spend completing this module?

elements.name: know_what_students_learn
elements.title: After completing this professional learning experience, I understand what my students will learn in Code.org's {module} curriculum.

elements.name: know_what_students_learn_module
elements.title: After completing this professional learning experience, I understand what my students will learn in Code.org's {module} unit.

elements.name: main_goal
elements.title: My main goal for this professional learning is to:
elements.natalia_comment: NOTE: This is a question that should be included in self-paced pl surveys, but would change per module to align with the module's content. Thus, this question is only to be used as a reference. Copy it and paste it in each module’s survey, changing what's in between curly brackets to align with the module. Add a suffix to the question's name indicating the module, e.g. main_goal_xyz

choices.text: Learn the {module} content covered in this module
Fulfill continuing education requirements or pursue professional credentials

elements.name: module_navigation
elements.title: Navigating this self-paced module was clear and easy.

elements.name: module_supported_learning
elements.title: How did each of the following support your learning?
elements.description: Rate how helpful was each option from Not helpful (1) to Very helpful (7).

rows.text: Reading a page that contained text and images about a topic.
Trying a task or activity in the Code.org platform.
Writing reflections on experiences and teaching practices.
Sharing strategies in the Code.org forum.

elements.name: nps_self_paced_pd
elements.title: How likely are you to recommend this self-paced professional learning experience to a friend or colleague?

elements.name: permission_to_quote
elements.title: I give Code.org permission to quote my written comments from this survey for use on social media, promotional materials, and other communications.

choices.text: Yes, I give Code.org permission to quote me and use my name.
Yes, I give Code.org permission to quote me, but I want to be anonymous.
No, I do not give Code.org my permission.

elements.name: pl_to_support_growth_teacher_cs
elements.title: How could Code.org continue to support your growth as a computer science teacher?

choices.text: Additional online self-paced professional learning topics on computer science concepts
Additional online self-paced professional learning topics on pedagogical and teaching practices
Complement online self-paced professional learning experiences with synchronous spaces to connect with other teachers, share experiences, and receive guidance
AI-assisted coaching tool to enhance CS teaching practices
AI-assisted coaching tool to support learning computer science concepts

elements.name: plan_ongoing_assessment
elements.title: After completing this module, I have a clear idea of how I will incorporate ongoing assessment into my {module} class.

elements.name: plan_to_teach
elements.title: Are you planning to teach Code.org's {module} content?
elements.natalia_comment: NOTE: set the {curriculum} variable in the simple survey configuration to pass-through the value you want to appear in the survey (eg. computer vision)

elements.name: plan_use_skills_learned
elements.title: Are you planning to use what you learned in this module in your role as an educator?

choices.text: Racial or ethnic background not listed

elements.title: Do you have any feedback about this module that you would like to share with the Code.org team?

choices.text: Out-of-school educator (e.g. tutor, after school teacher)
